description_long: This is a low-top casual sneaker with a light gray suede or nubuck upper and a white rubber sole. The shoe features a rounded toe, reinforced stitching along the side panels, and metal eyelets for laces, though the laces are missing. The collar is lightly padded and lined with a patterned fabric, providing comfort and a subtle visual accent. The heel area displays a dark gray accent strip and a visible brand label on the back. The outsole is primarily white with a brown section visible on the side, suggesting a non-slip tread suitable for urban environments.
description: A light gray low-top sneaker with a white rubber sole, padded collar, and visible brand label on the heel. The shoe is lace-less and shows subtle wear, with a patterned inner lining.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the padded collar, heel accent, and brand label on the back of the sole.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the side stitching, metal eyelets, and the transition from the upper to the sole.
description_view_2: Front three-quarter view displaying the rounded toe, missing laces, and the patterned inner lining.
description_view_3: Side-front view emphasizing the clean lines of the upper, the white sole, and the brown outsole section.
attribute_logo: Rectangular black label with white 'SPERRY' text on the heel and tongue.
